items.description: Join tiffi as she grovels and redeemed herself after the technical issue that exploded her show last week !!!!!!!
Join tiffi as she grovels and redeemed herself after the technical issue that exploded her show last week !!!!!!!

Join tiffi tonight as she takes you behind the curtain of the alt-pop world. Many unearthed gems to be uncovered tonight, like Jordan Briton and lillyvenus along with new tracks from heavy-hitters like Charli XCX and Carly Rae Jepson.
items.cardTitle: Prism: LOCAL BADDIES, UNEARTHED GEMS & KUROMI

items.description: Bringing you the best border-transcending pop track from at home and around the globe.
Bringing you the best border-transcending pop track from at home and around the globe.
items.cardTitle: Prism: NEW LOCAL MUSIC + MORE TO GIVEAWAY!

items.description: Bringing you the best border-transcending pop track from at home and around the globe.
Eurovision Junior contestant and Disney starlet Freya Skye drops in to chat her first ever Aussie headline shows off the back of the release of her debut EP 'Stardust'.
tiffi is back from overseas and finally getting to talk about sitting down with Katseye to chat about the upcoming WILD EP, learning phrases from each other and the asia pop world!
items.cardTitle: Prism: INTERVIEW WITH KATSEYE !!!! TIFFI IS BACK

items.description: Mowgli May steps up to fill in for Tiffi tonight, bringing a playlist full of girlie pops from around the world, and local rising stars to keep an eye out for. It’s bubbly, bright, fun - pop it and play!

Join Djanaba as she fills in for Tiffi on tonight’s episode of PRISM. This episode is packed with exciting Pop music! If you are looking to pop it, lock it, and polka dot it, you have stumbled upon the perfect episode.

Lucy Sugerman fills in for Tiffi on tonight’s episode of PRISM, the show all about pushing the boundaries of pop music - bringing her favourite pop selects at the moment from underrated Unearthed gems to global pop culture moments.

children.content: Bringing you the best border-transcending pop tracks from at home and around the globe.

taglines.text: Established in 1995, triple j Unearthed has kickstarted the careers of thousands of Australian musicians. triple j Unearthed is your home of Australian music discovery, and home to hundreds of thousands of tracks from emerging Australian artists.
